underlying_goal: Understand the ultra-research workflow, then fix a bug where the quality gate step skips revision and jumps to completion without incorporating user feedback
friction_detail: Claude wrote Chinese text in an English-language markdown prompt file, requiring user to catch and request correction.
brief_summary: User asked about the ultra-research workflow, identified a bug in the quality gate step that skipped revisions, had Claude fix it (with a language correction needed), then committed and pushed.
